infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Elder Care Companion uses your location to let family members know you are safe.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Elder Care Companion uses your location in the background to update your family.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Elder Care Companion needs access to your photos to update your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Elder Care Companion needs camera access to take a new profile picture.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Elder Care Companion to use your location.

plugins.photosPermission: Elder Care Companion needs access to your photos to update your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Elder Care Companion needs camera access to take a new profile picture.
